name: Intrust Bank, National Association
description_short: INTRUST Bank is a national bank offering personal and business checking, savings, credit cards, and lending products with free checking accounts and online/mobile banking access.
description_long: INTRUST Bank, National Association is celebrating 150 years of operation and positions itself as a community-focused bank built on values. The bank operates as a full-service national bank with both personal and business banking divisions, offering traditional banking services through physical banking centers and digital channels. The bank's core offerings include free personal checking accounts (no monthly service charge), savings accounts, credit cards with rewards programs (cash back and travel options), home equity loans, online and mobile banking platforms, business checking accounts, and various loan products. They also provide business treasury services including Treasury Online, Treasury Mobile, Remote Deposit Capture, and Lockbox Online functionality. For wealth management, they offer portfolio management and brokerage services. INTRUST differentiates itself through emphasis on customer relationships and personal service, particularly highlighting their work with small business customers during growth phases. They emphasize security and fraud protection, offering Visa Zero Liability protection on debit cards and educational content about scams targeting older adults. The bank has invested in digital convenience alongside traditional banking center locations. The company appears to be a legitimate regional/national bank with established infrastructure and services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Savings accounts with automatic transfer tools
Credit cards with cash back and travel rewards
Treasury Online and Treasury Mobile services
pros: Free checking account with no monthly service charge and free debit card with Visa Zero Liability fraud protection
Free online and mobile banking tools available across personal and business accounts
Multiple credit card options with choice of rewards programs (cash back or travel rewards)
Business-specific services including Treasury Online, Treasury Mobile, and Remote Deposit Capture for small businesses
Home equity loan products leveraging home equity for renovations and major purchases
Established 150-year history suggesting stability and longevity
Educational content on fraud prevention and financial planning for customers
cons: Website does not provide specific interest rates, APRs, or fee structures for products beyond free checking
Limited information about loan approval criteria, terms, or qualification requirements
No details on minimum deposit requirements, account opening process, or eligibility criteria visible on homepage
best_for: Small business owners seeking personal relationship-based banking with business-focused services
Consumers wanting free checking with fraud protection and digital banking convenience
Homeowners interested in home equity financing options
diagnosis: INTRUST Bank is best for consumers seeking full-service traditional banking with emphasis on free checking, digital convenience, and personal customer service, particularly small business owners. Main caveat: the website lacks transparent pricing and product details (rates, fees, terms) necessary for comparing this bank to competitors, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for specific financial terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: National bank offering personal and business checking, savings, credit cards, and lending products with free checking and online banking access.
